reviewed_head.subject: Implement review reply captured from workbench-tri-lane-001 implement review iteration-0001

review_scope.limitation: preparatory implement packet only; actual lane rebase is not yet complete

verdict.summary: Preparatory implement artifacts are acceptable as a rebase basis, but the lane is not fully rebased and implement_to_verify must remain pending.

findings.summary: The official OpenAI rebase is not yet complete and the iteration must not advance to verify.
The conversations_api inventory must use the ACM/OpenAI contract-aligned object model.
Schema-check evidence for the inventory and bundle boundary must be carried in the review bundle.
Re-implementation should open a new iteration and recreate the review-request bundle with the incremented iteration count.

next_patch_set: Rebase the lane artifacts fully onto the ACM/OpenAI contract
Recreate the implement review bundle with iteration-0002 identifiers
